name: Green Baboon, Defender of the Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>番</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>グリーン・バブーン
desc: When a face-up Beast monster you control is destroyed and sent to the GY, while this card is in your hand or GY (except during the Damage Step): You can pay 1000 LP; Special Summon this card.
mnst_eff: When a face-up Beast monster you control is destroyed and sent to the GY, while this card is in your hand or GY (except during the Damage Step): You can pay 1000 LP; Special Summon this card.
eff: When a face-up Beast monster you control is destroyed and sent to the GY, while this card is in your hand or GY (except during the Damage Step): You can pay 1000 LP; Special Summon this card.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 3: Yugi's World Mega Pack

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
